elements.original_description: A person standing at a crossroads, looking confused, with a large red 'X' marking one path. White background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a person standing at a crossroads looking confused, with a large bold red 'X' marking one path, pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
